extension.name: itheme
extension.author: Pavel Lange
extension.license: GNU General Public License version 2 or later

field.name: font-family-sans-serif
field.default: system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", "Noto Sans", "Liberation Sans", Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"
field.label: $font-family-sans-serif

field.name: font-family-monospace
field.default: SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", "Courier New", monospace
field.label: $font-family-monospace
